answers: Fan fiction = stories written by fans using existing characters/worlds. Harry Potter, Marvel, anime are popular fandoms.
Write fanfic on: Archive of Our Own (AO3), Fanfiction.net, Wattpad. AO3 has best tagging and community.
Tips: stay true to characters, use proper tags/warnings, proofread, and engage with readers who comment.
Fan fiction is great writing practice — you already have a world and characters, so you can focus on storytelling.
